# ScanFace

## Tags
face, biometric, identification, authentication, 2fa, access, login, dashed

## Categories
account, security, devices, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/scan-face)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ScanFace;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ScanFace { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
